provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human woman in her 20s who makes art from scrap metal and sells it on the docks, wearing paint-splattered work clothes over a thermal undersuit, a welding visor on a headband, heavy gloves pushed up to her elbows, steel-toe boots, multiple small sculptures hanging from her belt like trophies, she is the Reach version of culture — making beauty from wreckage
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
